CONTENT.Career statistics: As of 13 March 2024As of match played 10 June 2023Scores and results list Mexico's goal tally first.
CONTENT.International career: In April 2019, Álvarez was included in the 21-player squad to represent Mexico at the U-20 World Cup in Poland.Álvarez was called up by Jaime Lozano to participate with the under-23 squad at the 2019 Pan American Games, with Mexico winning the third-place match.On 3 July 2021, Álvarez made his senior national team debut in a friendly match against Nigeria.In October 2022, Álvarez was named in Mexico's preliminary 31-man squad for the 2022 FIFA World Cup, and in November, he was ultimately included in the final 26-man roster.

SUMMARY: Kevin Nahin Álvarez Campos (born 15 January 1999) is a Mexican professional footballer who plays as a right-back for Liga MX club América and the Mexico national team.
